mapper.sql: case when t.audit_date is not null and time(cast(t.audit_date as datetime)) > '00:00:00' then cast(t.audit_date as datetime) else t.create_time end

from his_mirror_consume_link l inner join gz_traceability t on t.id = l.traceability_id and t.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(t.del_flag, 0) = 0 and t.trace_source = 'HIS_MIRROR_HIGH' and t.order_status = 2 inner join gz_traceability_entry te on te.id = l.traceability_entry_id and te.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and ifnull(te.del_flag, 0) = 0 left join fd_department d on d.id = left join fd_department ad on ad.id = t.apply_dept_id left join fd_department ed on ed.id = t.exec_dept_id left join fd_supplier sup on sup.id = te.supplier_id and sup.tenant_id = l.tenant_id left join gz_dep_inventory gdi on gdi.id = l.gz_dep_inventory_id and gdi.tenant_id = l.tenant_id left join gz_shipment_entry gse on ifnull(gse.del_flag, 0) != 1 and gse.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and trim(ifnull(gse.in_hospital_code, '')) = trim(coalesce(nullif(trim(l.in_hospital_code), ''), nullif(trim(te.in_hospital_code), ''), nullif(trim(gdi.in_hospital_code), ''))) and trim(coalesce(nullif(trim(l.in_hospital_code), ''), nullif(trim(te.in_hospital_code), ''), nullif(trim(gdi.in_hospital_code), ''))) != '' left join gz_order_entry goe on ifnull(goe.del_flag, 0) != 1 and goe.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and goe.batch_no = coalesce(nullif(trim(gdi.batch_no), ''), nullif(trim(gse.batch_no), '')) left join fd_material m on m.id = te.material_id and m.tenant_id = l.tenant_id left join fd_factory ff on ff.factory_id = m.factory_id left join gz_high_consume_confirm c on c.id = l.confirm_id and c.tenant_id = l.tenant_id left join gz_high_consume_confirm_bill in_bill on in_bill.confirm_id = l.confirm_id and in_bill.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and in_bill.bill_type = 101 and ifnull(in_bill.del_flag, 0) = 0 and in_bill.supplier_id = cast(te.supplier_id as char) left join gz_high_consume_confirm_bill out_bill on out_bill.confirm_id = l.confirm_id and out_bill.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and out_bill.bill_type = 201 and ifnull(out_bill.del_flag, 0) = 0 and out_bill.supplier_id = cast(te.supplier_id as char) left join gz_high_consume_confirm_bill th_bill on th_bill.confirm_id = l.confirm_id and th_bill.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and th_bill.bill_type = 301 and ifnull(th_bill.del_flag, 0) = 0 and th_bill.supplier_id = cast(te.supplier_id as char) left join gz_high_consume_confirm_bill tk_bill on tk_bill.confirm_id = l.confirm_id and tk_bill.tenant_id = l.tenant_id and tk_bill.bill_type = 401 and ifnull(tk_bill.del_flag, 0) = 0 and tk_bill.supplier_id = cast(te.supplier_id as char) left join his_inpatient_charge_mirror inp on l.visit_kind = 'INPATIENT' and inp.id = l.mirror_row_id and inp.tenant_id = l.tenant_id left join his_outpatient_charge_mirror outp on l.visit_kind = 'OUTPATIENT' and outp.id = l.mirror_row_id and outp.tenant_id = l.tenant_id where l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ifnull(l.del_flag, 0) = 0 and l.gz_dep_inventory_id is not null and l.traceability_id is not null

order by
confirmStatus ${sortOrder == 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc'}, linkId desc
patientName ${sortOrder == 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc'}, linkId desc
visitNo ${sortOrder == 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc'}, linkId desc
chargeItemId ${sortOrder == 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc'}, linkId desc
itemName ${sortOrder == 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc'}, linkId desc
itemSpec ${sortOrder == 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc'}, linkId desc
materialName ${sortOrder == 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc'}, linkId desc
materialSpeci ${sortOrder == 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc'}, linkId desc
inHospitalCode ${sortOrder == 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc'}, linkId desc
unitPrice ${sortOrder == 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc'}, linkId desc
amt ${sortOrder == 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc'}, linkId desc
batchNumber ${sortOrder == 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc'}, linkId desc
consumeAuditTime desc, linkId desc
mapper.insert:
insert into gz_high_consume_confirm_line ( id, tenant_id, confirm_id, consume_link_id, dept_batch_consume_entry_id, traceability_entry_id, del_flag, create_time ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.confirmId}, #{e.consumeLinkId}, #{e.deptBatchConsumeEntryId}, #{e.traceabilityEntryId}, ifnull(#{e.delFlag}, 0), #{e.createTime})

insert into gz_high_consume_confirm_bill ( id, tenant_id, confirm_id, supplier_id, bill_type, stk_io_bill_id, bill_no, del_flag, create_time ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.confirmId}, #{e.supplierId}, #{e.billType}, #{e.stkIoBillId}, #{e.billNo}, ifnull(#{e.delFlag}, 0), #{e.createTime})
mapper.update:
update his_mirror_consume_link set confirm_status = 1, confirm_id = #{confirmId}, instant_io_audit_status = 0, instant_io_audit_by = null, instant_io_audit_time = null, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 and ifnull(confirm_status, 0) = 0 and id in
#{id}

update his_mirror_consume_link set instant_io_audit_status = 1, instant_io_audit_by = #{auditBy}, instant_io_audit_time = now(), update_by = #{auditBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 and ifnull(confirm_status, 0) = 1 and ifnull(instant_io_audit_status, 0) = 0 and id in
#{id}

update his_mirror_consume_link set instant_io_audit_status = 2, update_by = #{auditBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 and ifnull(confirm_status, 0) = 1 and ifnull(instant_io_audit_status, 0) = 1 and id in
#{id}

update his_mirror_consume_link set instant_io_audit_status = 2, update_by = #{auditBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 and ifnull(confirm_status, 0) = 1 and ifnull(instant_io_audit_status, 0) = 1 and confirm_id in
#{id}

update his_mirror_consume_link set confirm_status = 0, confirm_id = null, instant_io_audit_status = 0, instant_io_audit_by = null, instant_io_audit_time = null, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 and id in
#{id}
update gz_high_consume_confirm set warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{confirmId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0
mapper.select: select max(confirm_no) from gz_high_consume_confirm where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and confirm_no like concat(#{datePrefix}, '%') and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0

select id, tenant_id as tenantId, confirm_id as confirmId, supplier_id as supplierId, bill_type as billType, stk_io_bill_id as stkIoBillId, bill_no as billNo from gz_high_consume_confirm_bill where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and confirm_id = #{confirmId} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 order by supplier_id, bill_type
